channel.title: Overture on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Overture on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: Dockerfile for Overure
item.description: FROM alpine:latest ENV VERSION v1.4 WORKDIR /srv RUN set -xe && \ mkdir /config && \ apk add --no-cache unzip curl && \ curl -fsSLO --compressed "https://github.com/shawn1m/overture/releases/download/${VERSION}/overture-linux-amd64.zip" && \ unzip -o "overture-linux-amd64.zip" -d /srv && \ curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gfwlist/gfwlist/master/gfwlist.txt | base64 -d | sort -u | sed '/^$\|@@/d'| sed 's#!.\+##; s#|##g; s#@##g; s#http:\/\/##; s#https:\/\/##;' | sed '/\*/d; / apple\.com/d; /sina\.cn/d; /sina\.com\.cn/d; /baidu\.com/d; /qq\.com/d' | sed '/^[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+$/d' | grep '^[0-9a-zA-Z\.-]\+$' | grep '\.
